_source: Conformance evidence — the gate verdicts this site GENUINELY verifies, fed into lone's conformance() model (the report at /conformance + dist/api/v1/conformance.json). Each entry below is RE-PROVEN on every build by a named gate that BLOCKS on failure, so this declaration cannot drift from reality without turning CI red — the same discipline as the structure-audit baseline and data/audit/*. build.mjs merges this contract UNDER its own in-process build-facts (content-digests / ai-readability / feeds, which it self-checks), and a deploy/CI step MAY override any field with a live-captured value via $CONFORMANCE_EVIDENCE / $CONFORMANCE_LONE_FINDINGS. HONEST BY CONSTRUCTION: the strong WCAG 2.2 AA / OWASP ASVS compact claim stays WITHHELD — the manual + external GATING criteria that no build-time tool can prove (manual WCAG audit, OWASP ASVS L2, Core Web Vitals p75 field data, runtime reliability) are deliberately NOT asserted here, so they report not-assessed and the claim is partial. RE-PROVEN by build-time gates — now the VENDORED @bounded-systems/conformance-kit gates (one source of truth), not bespoke copies: the known-vuln scan (vendor/conformance-kit/gates/vuln-gate.mjs, production-scoped npm audit), the Nu HTML Checker (vendor/conformance-kit/gates/html-validator-gate.mjs, vnu over the built pages), Baseline availability (vendor/conformance-kit/gates/baseline-gate.mjs, stylelint-plugin-use-baseline — MEASURED 'widely': :has() and ::selection are each @supports-guarded progressive enhancements), and the axe serious/critical scan (scripts/axe-gate.mjs, axe-core in jsdom — browser-free CI; color-contrast via lone's static check; the vendored kit gate gives a full real-browser pass locally via tezcatl, `npm run check:axe`). Still WITHHELD because no build-time tool proves them: manual WCAG audit, OWASP ASVS L2, Core Web Vitals p75 field data, runtime reliability.

_gates.loneFindings: semantic.yml — `deno run gates/semantic/gate.ts` blesses each rendered DOM with lone; 0 error-severity findings (empty array) = the lone-measurable tier-1 criteria (HTML author / WAI-ARIA / WCAG-automatable) + the cognitive interface-complexity budget are met. The deploy/semantic job may inject the real findings via $CONFORMANCE_LONE_FINDINGS.
_gates.jsonLdShacl: shacl.yml / `npm run check:shacl` — shacl-runner reports conforms:true, 0 violating blocks.
_gates.seoTechnical: seo.yml / `npm run check:seo` — seo-gate passes: self-consistent canonicals, unique titles, RFC 9309 robots.txt, resolving sitemap, 0 broken internal links.
_gates.sbom: `npm run check:sbom` — SPDX-2.3 well-formed + complete (pinned set ⊆ SBOM ⊆ pinned set); keyless-signed in deploy.yml (cosign sign-blob → Sigstore bundle).
_gates.slsaProvenance: gen-attestation.mjs emits the in-toto/SLSA statement; deploy.yml keyless-signs it and the post-deploy verify step (verify/verify.mjs + cosign verify-blob) verifies it against the served artifact.
_gates.signedReleaseManifest: gen-sitemanifest.mjs (deploy) content-addresses the whole site to site.sha256; deploy.yml keyless-signs it.
_gates.ipfsCid: generators/gen-cid.mjs records the CIDv1 of the served site in provenance.json (contentAddress.ipfs.cid).
_gates.contentDigests: build.mjs writes RFC 9530 Repr-Digest headers into dist/_headers (also self-checked in-process).
_gates.reproducibleBuild: build.mjs is a pure, hermetic function of the contracts + the flake.lock-pinned toolchain + brand submodule — same inputs, same bytes (nix build .#site).
_gates.vulns: vendor/conformance-kit/gates/vuln-gate.mjs (brand-checks.yml) — the vendored kit gate runs `npm audit --omit=dev` over the SHIPPED dependency set (this static site has zero runtime deps, so production-scope = the deployed bytes) and fails closed above 0 known critical/high. The build toolchain's own advisories are tracked separately by `npm run audit`.
_gates.axe: Two layers. CI BLOCKER (conformance.yml): scripts/axe-gate.mjs --check — axe-core in jsdom (browser-free, no Chromium, no macOS runner) over every built page reports 0 serious/critical; the rendering-dependent rules (color-contrast, target-size) jsdom cannot evaluate are deferred to lone's static color_contrast check (a11y.wcag22-aa-auto). DEEPER LOCAL pass: `npm run check:axe` runs the vendored kit gate (vendor/conformance-kit/gates/axe-gate.mjs) in a REAL browser via tezcatl (macOS WebKit) for FULL WCAG 2.2 A/AA incl. contrast — verified clean over all 7 pages. So nothing is overclaimed: CI enforces the browser-free subset, lone covers contrast statically, and the real-browser pass corroborates both.
_gates.htmlValidator: vendor/conformance-kit/gates/html-validator-gate.mjs (conformance.yml) — the vendored kit gate runs vnu (the Nu Html Checker, a self-contained Java jar via vnu-jar — headless, no browser, no network) --errors-only over every built page and fails closed above 0 errors against the HTML Living Standard.
_gates.baseline: vendor/conformance-kit/gates/baseline-gate.mjs (conformance.yml) — the vendored kit gate maps the SHIPPED CSS to web-features Baseline data (via stylelint-plugin-use-baseline — headless, no browser) and fails closed below target "widely". MEASURED "widely": the two newer features (:has() in styles.css, ::selection in brand/css/base.css) are each guarded behind an @supports feature query, so they are progressive enhancements with a tested fallback rather than non-widely Baseline usage.
_gates.aiReadability: vendor/conformance-kit/gates/ai-readability-gate.mjs (conformance.yml / `npm run check:ai-readability`) — the vendored kit gate re-proves semantic.ai-readability over the built dist: llms.txt present, its internal links genuinely RESOLVE (real link-resolution, not a proxy), and EVERY content page ships a Markdown twin (index, resume, blog index + posts, conformance, provenance — only 404 is exempt). build.mjs computes the same {llmsTxtPresent, linksResolve, markdownSiblings} in-process via the gate's OWN evaluator (evaluateAiReadability) — one source of truth, replacing the prior bespoke self-check that conflated linksResolve with sibling presence.
_gates.tokenA11y: vendor/conformance-kit/gates/token-a11y.mjs (conformance.yml / `npm run check:token-a11y`, contract/token-a11y.json) — the vendored kit suite over the @bounded-systems/brand design tokens this site ships. PALETTE: the brand's own declared pairings (brand/tokens/palette.pairings.json — every real fg/bg combo, no extraction false-positives) all clear WCAG-AA + CVD (deuteranopia/protanopia/tritanopia) + APCA + non-text (1.4.11) → design.palette-contrast met. TYPOGRAPHY: type tokens give body line-height ≥1.5, achievable text spacing (1.4.12), min font size, legible weights (16px body) → design.typography met. NOT asserted: design.target-size + design.opacity-contrast are N/A (this content site has no sized interactive controls / token opacity) and design.token-likeness is WITHHELD pending a brand dedup decision — the suite flags 3 near-duplicate token VALUES (card≈white identical; ink-soft≈ink-mono ΔE 0.92; paper≈card-alt ΔE 1.78) that are intentional semantic aliases, a design judgment the static gate defers on.
